field_sources.default: not directly measurable on current hardware
field_sources.real_ack: SEND followed by ACK or timeout

routing_params.fallback_policy: no Dijkstra fallback; D3QN route failures are reported separately and excluded from ACK timeout loss

path_degrade_policy.all_degraded_policy: use highest Q path and mark all_candidates_degraded

commands.matrix_mode: source in sources, target in nodes-source
commands.two_send_latency_policy: first SEND gateway->source, second SEND gateway->source->target; point_to_point_ms=second_ack_ms-first_ack_ms
